definition:
1. to bring into hand, to manage, master, subdue , (Aristophanes Comicus) 
2. mostly in Mid., to conquer, overpower, subdue , (Herdotus Historicus); so, τήνδ᾽ ἐχειρούμην ἄγραν became master of  this booty, (Sophocles Tragicus) 
3. without any sense of violence, to master, subdue , (Xenophon Historicus), etc. 
4. χειροῦμαι is also Pass. to be subdued , [variant datesTragica Adespota; future χειρωθήσομαι (Demosthenes Orator); aor1 ἐχειρώθην (Herdotus Historicus); perfect κεχείρωμαι (Aeschulus Tragicus) (ML)
